desc: Hurghada is Egypt's classic Red Sea resort base, combining year-round sun with highly accessible reefs for snorkeling and diving. Demand is strongest in spring and autumn shoulder months plus winter-sun periods, while midsummer remains viable but very hot for land-based excursions.
hls: Clear Red Sea water and coral reefs
Good base for desert and Bedouin excursions

todo.name: Snorkel or dive Giftun Island reefs
todo.desc: Join a boat trip to coral sites with colorful fish and high-clarity water.

todo.name: Discover dive course or fun dives
todo.desc: Use Hurghada’s many PADI centers for intro lessons, certification, or guided reef dives.

todo.name: Beach club day in Sahl Hasheesh or Makadi
todo.desc: Relax on groomed sands with calm water entries suited to long swim sessions.

todo.name: Hurghada Marina evening walk
todo.desc: Stroll cafés and waterfront promenades for sunset views and casual dining.

todo.name: Desert quad bike and Bedouin camp
todo.desc: Take a late-afternoon desert tour for dunes, tea, and stargazing outside the city lights.

todo.name: Submarine or glass-boat tour
todo.desc: A good alternative for seeing reef life without diving, especially with children.

wifi.note: Connectivity in resorts is improving but still uneven; local SIM/eSIM data is advisable for dependable coverage.

prac.fltNote: Direct flights are available from Gatwick; London City typically requires a connection. Return fares are often ~£180–£380 off-peak, ~£380–£560 in shoulder demand, and ~£560+ during winter-sun and school-holiday peaks.
prac.visa: Most visitors require an Egypt eVisa or visa on arrival; verify current rules before booking.
alerts: Summer daytime heat can exceed comfort for desert tours; prioritize early departures.
Reef etiquette enforcement varies by operator — choose eco-compliant dive/snorkel providers.
Wind and sea conditions can alter boat itineraries at short notice.

sweet: March to May and October to November are usually the strongest all-round periods for sea conditions and comfortable temperatures.
